title: MCP tool call view component with server-specific styling
purpose: Displays MCP tool call information with server and tool badges, input JSON, and output panel using server-specific color themes.
module_context: Exports parseMcpToolName function to extract server and tool from MCP names, ACCENTS record mapping server names to color themes, and DEFAULT_ACCENT for unknown servers. Also exports accentFor function to resolve color themes for servers.

steps.content: Check if the name starts with the expected 'mcp__' prefix.
IF the prefix is missing, return null.
Extract the portion of the name after the 'mcp__' prefix.
Find the first occurrence of the '__' delimiter.
IF no delimiter is found, return null.
Split the rest into server and tool components using the delimiter.
IF either server or tool is empty, return null.
Return an object containing the server, tool, and original name.
Look up the server in the ACCENTS mapping.
IF a matching theme is found, return it.
ELSE return the DEFAULT_ACCENT theme.
Parse the tool name to extract server and tool components.
Determine the server name, falling back to 'mcp' if parsing fails.
Determine the tool name, falling back to the full name if parsing fails.
Resolve the color theme for the server.
Format the tool input as a JSON string with indentation.
IF JSON formatting fails, convert the input to a string representation.
Render the server and tool badges with appropriate styling.
IF input exists and is not empty, display it in a formatted code block.
Render the output panel with tool use ID, status, output, and error.
